# PUT /api/v1/org/branches/{id}/deactivate

**Deactivate Branch**

إلغاء تفعيل فرع

Operation ID: `API-ORG-010`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: BRANCH_UPDATE (found on service:BranchService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer | Yes |  |
